recommendations.title: Gone Fishin'
recommendations.overview: Two fishing fanatics get in trouble when their fishing boat gets stolen while on a trip.

recommendations.title: Young Guns
recommendations.overview: A group of young gunmen, led by Billy the Kid, become deputies to avenge the murder of the rancher who became their benefactor. But when Billy takes their authority too far, they become the hunted.

recommendations.title: The Principal
recommendations.overview: Burglary. Drugs. Assault. Rape. The students at Brandel High are more than new Principal Rick Latimer bargained for. Gangs fight to control the school using knives - even guns - when they have to. When Latimer and the head of security try to clean up

recommendations.title: A Dog's Journey
recommendations.overview: A dog finds the meaning of his own existence through the lives of the humans he meets.

recommendations.title: Incredibles 2
recommendations.overview: Elastigirl springs into action to save the day, while Mr. Incredible faces his greatest challenge yet – taking care of the problems of his three children.

recommendations.title: The Worst Person in the World
recommendations.overview: The chronicles of four years in the life of Julie, a young woman who navigates the troubled waters of her love life and struggles to find her career path, leading her to take a realistic look at who she really is.

recommendations.title: Mia and the White Lion
recommendations.overview: A young girl from London moves to Africa with her parents where she befriends a lion cub.

recommendations.title: Next Avengers: Heroes of Tomorrow
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Action, Adventure, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: The children of the Avengers hone their powers and go head to head with the very enemy responsible for their parents' demise.

recommendations.title: I Got Life!
recommendations.overview: Aurore has separated, just lost her job, and learns that she is going to be a grandmother.

recommendations.title: The Cat Returns
recommendations.overview: Young Haru rescues a cat from being run over, but soon learns it's no ordinary feline; it happens to be the Prince of the Cats.
